name: pegasus-events-services
description: PegII Services Controller and service runner

scripts.build-service: cd ..\service && activate.bat && python -m nuitka --standalone --follow-imports --jobs=4 --no-debug --output-filename=pegII-service app.py && deactivate && cd ..\controller
scripts.build: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build-service && npm run build-controller
